summary: Bug Fixes Iteration 13 - All 3 bug fixes verified and working correctly. 1) Armory page uses compact 6-column grid (grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-6) with 2:3 aspect ratio poster cards. 2) Blog/Den page has alternating zigzag layout with wolf placeholder for posts without images. 3) AI cover image generation endpoint fixed - 'size' parameter removed, generation works (tested with 120s timeout).

tests: Product items have required fields (title, item_type, slug) - PASS
Blog posts have cover_image field - PASS
AI cover image validates title required - PASS
AI cover image generates successfully with valid payload - PASS

tests_passed: 1. Armory page (/services) loads correctly with title 'The Armory'
2. Featured Collection uses 6-column grid (grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-6)
3. All Products section uses same 6-column grid layout
4. Product cards have aspect-[2/3] ratio (poster style)
5. Product cards have hover overlays with full info (no extra content section below)
6. Films page still uses correct 6-column grid for comparison
7. Blog/Den page (/blog) loads correctly with title 'The Den'
8. Blog posts use alternating zigzag layout (even idx: image-left, odd idx: content-left)
9. Posts without cover images display wolf placeholder SVG with 'SHADOW WOLVES' text
10. Blog cover images use aspect-video (16:9) ratio
11. Admin blog modal shows AI cover button with data-testid='ai-cover-btn'
12. AI cover button is visible and enabled when title is filled

bug_fix_1_armory_grid.details: TheDen.jsx uses grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-6 matching Films page. ProductCard component rewritten with 2:3 aspect ratio poster cards and hover overlays (no content section below image).

bug_fix_2_blog_zigzag.details: Blog.jsx uses alternating layout with idx % 2 logic. Even indices (0,2,4) show image-left/content-right. Odd indices (1,3,5) get md:flex-row-reverse for content-left/image-right. Wolf placeholder displayed for posts without cover images.

bug_fix_3_ai_cover_image.details: ai.py line 118 no longer passes 'size' parameter to generate_images(). Endpoint tested successfully - generates cover image and returns image_url + prompt_used.

seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing products and blog posts
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 bug fixes verified. 1) Armory page compact grid matches Films page (6-col), poster-style cards with hover overlays. 2) Blog zigzag layout working with wolf placeholder for posts without images. 3) AI cover image generation working without 'size' parameter error. Only 1 published blog post exists so full zigzag alternation not visible, but code logic verified correct.
